function.name: get_vkyc_slots
function.description: Fetch available VKYC (video KYC) time slots. VKYC operates between 9 AM and 9 PM IST. Returns up to 5 slots for the requested date. Call this when the customer is at the VKYC_PENDING stage and ready to schedule.

date.description: Date to check slots for in YYYY-MM-DD format. Leave empty for today.
